'''Nov Gejjen''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] politician and the father of [[Dur Gejjen]].

==Biography==
During the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]] he opposed the [[Human League]] and [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]. Nov befriended [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] as Leia recalled nearly twenty-two years later. He died sometime before the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1stm}}
